data.Description: Specialized liquid coatings applied to the spacecraft surfaces to manage and regulate the ratio of absorptivity and emissivity for optimal energy balance and thermal performance.
Materials used to modify spacecraft surface properties to manage and regulate temperature.
Provide a conductive link between a heat source and thermal sink to conductively transfer heat.

data.Passive Technology: Thermal Contact Conductance and Bolted Joint Conductance
data.Description: Heat transfer by “contact” conductance between two surfaces pressed together by uniform pressure can be varied by using interface filler materials and conductive gaskets.
Deployed material that reduces the amount of incident solar flux on a spacecraft.
Controls heat transfer between spacecraft surfaces.
Dedicated surface for dissipating excess heat via radiative heat transfer.
Energy is absorbed as material within a metal compartment changes phase because of exposure to a heat source.
An electromechanical device which controls the flow of electrical current in response to temperature change.
